examples: If these are the central characters of our story about poverty, what layers of perceptions, myths, and realities must we unearth to find meaningful solutions and support?
When you dig deeper you steal what you unearth.
They will unearth the buried treasure here.
However, extensive research by serious scholars has failed to unearth the text of this religious guidance.
Fearing that, some will probably order the bulldozers quietly to bury what they unearth.
